programme.title: A Journey to Love
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Not Others
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Why Is He Still Single
programme.desc: A quirky yet kind-hearted man, firmly against marriage, sparks humor and reflection as he navigates life. Despite his eccentricity, he finally meets the woman of his dreams and must decide how to win her heart.

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Fight For Love
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man and Wing-sum go with Wing-yan to file a report to the police. Wai-man eventually forgets about suing Sai-hang and his father as he wants to protect Wing-yan. Lik-to, in his capacity as Shuk-foon’s younger brother, launches a custody battle against Wai-man.

programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: Karok La Kau!
programme.desc: Menampilkan seramai 78 orang selebriti berentap antara satu sama lain di pentas karaoke yang luar biasa.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Aniq terkejut apabila mengetahui dalang di sebalik pembunuhan Kahar. Ernie dan Qistina berjumpa dengan Aniq untuk mengetahui status pembelian tanah mereka itu.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Luqman bersetuju jika Aniq menjadi pengganti Tuan Budi, tetapi meletakkan satu syarat yang mungkin akan membongkar rahsia Aniq. Nadia rasa Benjamin perlu memihak kepada Aniq.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Qistina dimarahi oleh Herni kerana lewat pulang. Herni mengingatkan Qistina bahawa status keluarga mereka dan keluarga Luqman adalah sangat berbeza.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Herni dan Qistina berharap akan ada berita gembira tentang status pembelian tanah mereka. Herni marah apabila mengetahu apa yang Aniq pernah cuba lakukan terhadap Qistina.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Diana berterima kasih kepada Qistina kerana kehadirannya telah membuat Luqman semakin bahagia. Akibat berlaku salah faham, kekecohan berlaku antara Hadi dan Benjamin.

programme.title: Hard To Heart
programme.desc: Program temubual bersama artis tersohor, mengenai jatuh bangun mereka dalam sepanjang terbabit dengan kerjaya seni tempatan.

programme.title: Ahli Bapak Bapak Club
programme.desc: Mengisahkan 3 sahabat baik, Joe, Bob dan Nick dalam mengharungi kehidupan mereka yang penuh dugaan dan pancaroba selaku lelaki, suami dan bapa.

programme.title: Jalan Kembali: Bohsia 2
programme.desc: Empat sekawan cuba mematahkan rancangan seorang lelaki yang cuba merosakkan gadis-gadis jalanan dengan membawa mereka ke jalan yang haram.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Action!
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang opah yang pernah menjadi perisik di luar pengetahuan keluarganya. Kini dia terpaksa menggunakan skil risikannya untuk menyelamatkan cucunya yang diculik.

programme.title: Family Spy
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang opah yang pernah menjadi perisik di luar pengetahuan keluarganya. Kini dia terpaksa menggunakan skil risikannya untuk menyelamatkan cucunya yang diculik.

programme.title: Carta 10
programme.desc: Carta 10 merupakan sebuah program majalah berbentuk carta mengenai perkara yang menarik di bumi Malaysia.

programme.title: Sesat
programme.desc: Sesat, rancangan yang menguji minda dan ikhtiar hidup selebriti tempatan dalam mencari destinasi yang ditetapkan.

programme.title: Diari Mangkuk Tingkat Bersama Ili
programme.desc: Bersama Ili menyediakan hidangan yang menyelerakan untuk selebriti terkenal tanah air dalam Diari Mangkuk Tingkat.

programme.title: My Buskers
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mempersembahkan selebriti-selebriti tempatan menyanyi bersama-sama dengan buskers-buskers tempatan menyanyikan lagu-lagu popular.

programme.title: Aunty Reporting For Duty
programme.desc: Saksikan geng mak-mak melakukan cabaran yang menguji fizikal dan minda mereka. Mampukah geng mak-mak menyelesaikan misi yang diberi?

programme.title: Konsert Yang Paling Padu
programme.desc: Program nyanyian dan bual bicara yang menghimpunkan 2 penyanyi yang dikenali ramai. Mereka bukan sahaja mempunyai persamaan dari segi karier tapi juga profil peribadi.

programme.title: expeRIAnce:Fantasy Escape
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merealisasikan impian peminat bertuah untuk melakukan aktiviti yang mereka gemari bersama selebriti pilihan mereka yang turut berkongsi pengalaman dan memberi motivasi.

programme.title: Extreme Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan travelog yang akan mengikuti pengembaraan 3 sekawan menerokai tempat-tempat menarik di semenanjung Malaysia demi merealisasikan bucketlist masing-masing.

programme.title: Azam and Johan
programme.desc: Azam & Johan bercita-cita menjadi pemain bola sepak profesional. Kemalangan menyebabkan Azam lumpuh, memusnahkan impian bola sepaknya. Ibu mereka menyalahkan Johan atas kemalangan itu.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: Sesat
programme.desc: Sesat, rancangan yang menguji minda dan ikhtiar hidup selebriti tempatan dalam mencari destinasi yang ditetapkan.

programme.title: In Love with Tya
programme.desc: In Love with Tya adalah program realiti yang memaparkan perjalanan hidup Tya untuk merealisasikan impiannya dan bagaimana Tya berjaya mengatasi masalah dalam kehidupan seharian.

programme.title: Jalan Kembali: Bohsia 2

programme.desc: A real estate agent helps Jeremy, Jodi, their daughter and their pets find a new Yukon home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Great White Shark 2024
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they've helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess joins the lamb-raising Siddoway family as they begin sorting the animals that are ready for processing. She then returns to the lodge, where she demonstrates how to prepare and grill lamb ribs.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess and her husband Chris head to their favorite hunting grounds, Redstone Ranch, situated in the heart of the migratory dove flyway.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers look into salmon taken illegally,including in a closed stream and with illegal gear. A CO instructs a family on where to fish legally.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol during the opening days of deer season for hunting with both archery equipent and firearms. A CO helps remove two deer from an elementary school after they crashed through a window in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Continuing his Journey down the East-coast of Tasmania Ben Milbourne visits the breath-taking Freycinet Marine Park and Lodge to enjoy some of the freshest Oysters and Mussels you can find.

programme.title: Tasting Tasmania
programme.desc: Ben Milbourne discovers the hidden gem that is Maria Island, only accessible by plane or boat, the Island boasts historic ruins, sweeping bays and jaw dropping cliffs.

programme.desc: The 34th season of the Premier League sees Liverpool defend its title against a host of teams keen for glory themselves. 20 teams are in the mix but only 1 champion will emerge ultimately.

programme.title: PL GOATs 2025/26
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.title: Ganteng Ganteng Bau Domba, Tapi Aku Suka
programme.desc: Yosi was heartbroken when she found out that her brother-in-law was the guy she had been crushing on since high school and that she had to marry her own brother. But everything changed when Ryan, a local sheep farmer, came along and healed her broken heart. Ryan had fallen in love with Yosi.

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Maya (Shanice Margaretha) feels abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel), the man she likes, because Sigit often uploads videos with a beautiful girl. Maya is determined to change her appearance and behavior.

programme.title: AIRA EPS 7
programme.desc: Aira was at the peak of happiness as she prepared to welcome her wedding day with her beloved, Adrian. However, one day before the big day, a request from her superior, Haris, forced her to return to the office to send a forgotten email. That decision became the starting point of a tragedy that changed Aira's life forever.

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 19
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: Margaret Keane, a legendary painter, struggles to reclaim her fame after her husband takes the credit for her artwork.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A dying curator of the Louvre hides cryptic clues on Da Vinci paintings. Now it is up to Robert Langdon and Sophie Neveu to follow the clues and unearth a secret kept hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
programme.desc: Maria Altman, a Jewish refugee, along with her lawyer Randy Schoenberg, faces several difficulties while reclaiming the painting of her aunt, which was seized by the Nazis before World War II.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Charlie suffers from depression and is nervous about entering high school. However, with the help of two seniors, he learns how to deal with his struggles.

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: Pat, who is sent to a mental health facility after brutally attacking his wife's lover, walks out of the centre after eight months and meets Tiffany in a bid to mend ways with his wife.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road
programme.desc: A near-perfect couple decides to transfer to Paris in order to escape their satiated lives. But their relationship starts to strain when the woman's pregnancy forces them to change their plan.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife, who has been enslaved by Calvin, a hard-hearted plantation owner.

programme.title: BARAYA URANG PASUNDAN
programme.desc: Semi-documentary that explores a region of West Java lived by Sundanese

programme.title: LUCUNYA TUH DISINI LEBARAN TUH SILATURAHMI
programme.desc: Accompanying the 2018 Eid holiday, "Lucunya Tuh Di Sini" comes to entertain Indosiar viewers. This special edition celebrates Jakarta’s anniversary, featuring stand-up comedy performances by several comedians.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Lupa Kewajiban Karena Jabatan
programme.desc: Firman is an ordinary employee who becomes the new manager at his company. Unfortunately, he achieves the position by framing the former manager, Indra, accusing him of fraud-despite the fact that Firman got his job thanks to Indra’s help.

programme.title: Aura 34 Babe Angels Bikin Hati Semrawut
programme.desc: Mayang (Emilia Samma) berinsiatif untuk menyewa Juleha (Larasati Nugroho) sebagai bodyguard Kevin (Mahdy Reza) setelah Kevin diserang oleh sekelompok pria, tapi Kevin menolaknya mentah-mentah. Menurut Kevin, jika Juleha menjadi bodyguard-nya, apakah hidupnya akan sengsara. Lagi pula baginya, tidak mungkin seorang perempuan menjadi bodyguard. Bagaimana kisah selanjutnya?

Lawak Tak Lagho
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Boss Kira
programme.desc: Roy Azman, Syafa, & Haiqal, berentap sesama sendiri untuk mendapatkan hadiah lumayan dengan syarat, perlu bermain & meneka samada berat, tinggi, panjang, & harga objek di hadapan mereka.

programme.title: Healing With Zizan
programme.desc: Dua selebriti lelaki tanahair yang akan ditemu bual oleh Zizan tentang Hijrah mereka, berkongsi pandangan dan perjalanan rohani mereka tentang apa yang mendorong mereka untuk maju ke hadapan

programme.title: Kisah Tok Kadi S2
programme.desc: Tok Kadi yang baru mendirikan rumah tangga kini menghadapi pelbagai cabaran dan dugaan di alam perkahwinan.dan turut diuji dengan pelbagai karenah pasangan pengantin yang ingin dinikahkan.

programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Perang Nasi Dagang: Kelate VS Ganu
programme.desc: Kisah komedi, antara Daniel yang menjual nasi dagang terengganu, dan Stopa orang lama yang menjual nasi dagang dari kelantan, bersaing dengan bermacam-macam cara dan idea demi kedai nasi dagang mereka.
